Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Overlord]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Leah intends to speak with the Overlord regarding certain matters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — The Overlord is a figure who holds prisoners of war.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — The Overlord is a power that villagers cannot stand up to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Overlords are a class of powerful beings mentioned by the children.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — The Overlord has received requests for parley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — The Overlord has a Master of Household.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — The Overlord is a figure the Myrians are standing against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — The Overlord personally took Leah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Simon killed an Overlord.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — The Overlord is dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Each Overlord guards one Hanging Tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 16''' — The Overlord is in an alliance with the Grandmasters and his Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — An Overlord is a title for someone serving the throne of Damasca.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Overlord is a stage that Eithan has the potential to advance to.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — An Overlord is defending Kiro and Meira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — The propulsion constructs on the cloudship thrum with an Overlord's power.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — The journey to Overlord is a long one.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — The box in Sophara's trial was protected by the power of an Overlord.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — Advancing to Overlord can result in a Path ending if the advancement is unsuccessful.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Mercy notes that Eithan is not performing much better without advancing to Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Advancement to Overlord requires a revelation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Overlord is a stage or concept that Lindon seeks tips on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The power of an Overlord fills Mercy when she opens the fifth page of her book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Winter Sage is concerned about Yerin advancing to Overlord without learning to read.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Overlord is a rank or stage Lindon hopes to reach using the Consume technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Advancing through Overlord can be astronomically expensive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — An Overlord led a squad that locked onto Lindon's team when they tried to take prisoners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Using Northstrider's technique could allow Lindon to reach Overlord in weeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Mercy can temporarily advance to Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Overlord is a level of madra or power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — An Underlady struggled to maintain an Overlord’s madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — There were no dragons in the group above Overlord rank.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — Overlord is the bottleneck for Lindon's advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — The Overlord revelation provides new insight into how one relates to the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — An Overlord was ruined by Eithan with spiritual damage.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 2''' — Pride mentioned fighting two Overlords at once.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Overlord is a level of advancement higher than touching the Void Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Overlords are a rank or type of being that can be transported via teleportation anchors.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon holds the status of an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Overlord is a legendary rank.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — An Overlord is a rank or type of entity below an Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Mercy could not reach the Overlord level on her own.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The peak of the Overlord stage can be reached by processing madra.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 10''' — Orthos advanced to Overlord within months inside Ghostwind Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Orthos devours an Overlord spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — An Overlord is the most advanced crewman on an enemy cloudship.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Overlord is a stage of advancement that Reigan Shen reached.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — An Overlord can better recall lessons and sense the Way.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
